item.title: The UAE is a Zionist state that is engaged in extra extraordinary atrocities
item.description:
The UAE is a Zionist state that is engaged in extra extraordinary atrocities. It is not surprising that they have spent billions in entirely unoriginal propaganda.#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: please provide me the list because whenever we have done that it has destabilised and led to an authoritarian leadership and SUP...
item.description:
please provide me the list because whenever we have done that it has destabilised and led to an authoritarian leadership and SUPER contentiously , Kosovo and Korea, but both were mass unaliving events



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: The Israelis are not the victims, they are a member of the perpetrating nation
item.description:
The Israelis are not the victims, they are a member of the perpetrating nation. So you can have empathy on an interpersonal level to individuals that’s fine, but in terms of political discussion be aware how that is misuse to justify the very systems of violence that caused this



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: If you still disagree with me, sure please come critique me but if you sit and say do I disagree literally with what he’s saying...
item.description:
If you still disagree with me, sure please come critique me but if you sit and say do I disagree literally with what he’s saying, and is what he’s saying on the represented in the media - then perhaps you don’t disagree with the actual whole of my content



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is a classic strategy of propaganda though because it doesn’t have to be consistent it has to be helpful and one side of th...
item.description:
This is a classic strategy of propaganda though because it doesn’t have to be consistent it has to be helpful and one side of this argument helped shield accountability and the other enables a slow but tolerable entrance of Zion is propaganda into the platform#greenscreenvideo



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
